title: Personal/Grooming Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Youth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Personal/Grooming Supplies * LGBTQ2+ Youth 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - LGBTQ2+ Youth AIDS/HIV Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ALWAYS HERE BOOKSTORE MUTUAL AID LOCKERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mutual aid lockers that provide supplies such as gender-affirming gear (chest binders, bras), informational pamphlets on how to safely use gender-affirming clothes, socks and underwear, makeup, menstrual products, Narcan, contraception, (including emergency contraception), and hand sanitizer. Also occasionally offers trans tape, breast forms, tucking underwear, and other trans shapeware. Supplies availability is dependent on donations. 4555 N Williams Avenue Portland, OR 97217 Eligibility: Individuals in the LGBTQIA+ community Hours: Wednesday-Sunday 11am-6pm Email (503) 208-4799 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH NEW AVENUES COLUMBIA STREET SMYRC RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community calendar of events focused on creating art, playing music, joining open mic nights, attending drag shows, and participating in support groups. Additional services include a food pantry, hygiene items, a clothing closet, gender-affirming clothing, and referrals to other resources and support. 1220 SW Columbia Street Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Ages 13-24 who identify as LGBTQIA2S+ Hours: Varies by event Email (503) 872-9664 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALWAYS HERE BOOKSTORE MUTUAL AID LOCKERS NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH SMYRC RESOURCE CENTER
